type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Some years there is an abundance of rockfill generated in the process of excavating openings (tunnels, raises and waste-rock sorted from block-mining activities); this material is given first priority as (rock) fill. At other times, to continue with production operations, the mines supplement the demand for rockfill with material stockpiled on surface, or material generated through blasting activities of the open pit.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Refinery going to half power and issues with Nickel Carbonate Recovery System. Some years there is an abundance of rockfill generated in the process of excavating openings (tunnels, raises and waste-rock sorted from block-mining activities); this material is given first priority as (rock) fill. At other times, to continue with production operations, the mines supplement the demand for rockfill with material stockpiled on surface, or material generated through blasting activities of the open pit. Another factor affecting fluctuations in this data is the amount of mine development activity and location of the areas being mined (ie. the proximity, accessibility and suitability of the overburden).
